subtasks.description: Query MongoDB to retrieve all active billing contracts with contract ID, vendor name, contracted annual value, and contract status. Filter for status = 'active'.
Query SQL to fetch all invoices issued in 2024, grouped by contract ID, calculating total invoiced amount per contract. Include invoice dates and amounts.

Reconcile contracted annual values from MongoDB against actual 2024 invoiced amounts from SQL. Calculate variance percentage for each contract. Flag contracts with >10% variance (both over and under). Produce a reconciliation report with contract ID, vendor, contracted value, invoiced total, variance amount, variance percentage, and flag status.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks with minimal decomposition: (1) MongoDB query to fetch active contracts is simple single-collection retrieval (small tier). (2) SQL query to aggregate 2024 invoices is straightforward GROUP BY aggregation (small tier). (3) Cross-reconciliation tier is mid because it must join and reconcile data from two distinct sources, calculate derived metrics (variance %), and produce classification/flagging logic—this requires multi-signal reasoning to determine which contracts meet the >10% variance threshold and generate the reconciliation report. The classification and flagging are integral to cross_recon output, not a separate policy step.

output.sql: SELECT contract_id, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_invoiced_2024, COUNT(invoice_id) AS invoice_count, MIN(invoice_date) AS first_invoice_date, MAX(invoice_date) AS last_invoice_date, ARRAY_AGG(invoice_date ORDER BY invoice_date) AS invoice_dates, ARRAY_AGG(amount_usd ORDER BY invoice_date) AS invoice_amounts FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY contract_id ORDER BY total_invoiced_2024 DESC
